Reviews Contact

Boise's Trusted Physical Therapy Experts

Personalized care for active Idaho lifestyles. Helping you recover, move better, and stay strong in our unique climate.

Call Now: 555-phy-r91

Get a FREE Estimate Today!

Rooted in Boise, Dedicated to Your Health

Founded in 2012, Summit Physical Therapy grew from a small practice near the Boise River Greenbelt to become Ada County's most recommended clinic. Our team understands how Idahoans live, work, and play.

Learn More About Us
Since 2014 Established
Locally Owned

W2 Employees

Our Physical Therapy Services

Professional physical therapy solutions tailored to your needs.

Sports Injury Rehabilitation

Specialized care for athletes of all levels, from Little League to weekend warriors.

Learn More →

Post-Surgical Rehabilitation

Structured recovery programs for joint replacements, spinal procedures, and orthopedic surgeries.

Learn More →

Chronic Pain Management

Long-term solutions for arthritis, back pain, and repetitive strain injuries.

Learn More →

Vestibular Rehabilitation

Specialized care for dizziness, vertigo, and balance disorders.

Learn More →

Work Injury Rehabilitation

Targeted programs for job-related injuries and return-to-work transitions.

Learn More →

Frequently Asked Questions

Get answers to the most common questions about our physical therapy services.

How do you adapt therapy for Boise's elevation changes?

We gradually acclimate patients through controlled incline training and oxygenation techniques, especially important for those frequently traveling between the valley and higher elevations like McCall or Sun Valley.

Can you help with rodeo-related injuries common in Idaho?

Absolutely. Our team has specialized experience working with rodeo athletes, addressing unique issues like bull riding back trauma or roping shoulder injuries through western movement pattern analysis.

Reviews From Our Physical Therapy Customers

See what our satisfied customers have to say about their experience.

"After tearing my ACL skiing at Bogus Basin, Summit got me back on the mountain in record time. Their elevation-aware rehab program made the difference - other clinics didn't account for how the altitude change affects recovery. The anti-gravity treadmill let me safely simulate runs before hitting actual slopes."

Mark R. Sports Injury Rehabilitation

"As a North End resident with an older home, my back pain was aggravated by constant stair climbing and yard work. Summit analyzed my daily movements and suggested modifications for our historic home's layout. Their 'pine needle raking technique' saved me every fall. Finally found relief that works with my Boise lifestyle."

Elena S. Chronic Pain Management

"Following my hip replacement at St. Luke's, Summit's terrain-specific therapy was invaluable. They prepared me for everything from the steep driveway at my Bench neighborhood home to navigating the Capitol steps during legislative sessions. The winter safety tips prevented falls during icy commutes downtown."

James T. Post-Surgical Rehabilitation
